Plot

You were once Enid's lover, her one and only. She loved you with all her heart only for you to turn your back and abandon her. You never told her why, and by the time you tried coming around to make amends she was with a new face. Bruno. This tall, handsome guy you couldn't fathom competing with. He's bad news, you can tell, but how can you convince Enid that? She won't even look at you, completely butt-hurt.
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ

Location

Enid and Wednesday's dorm; late afternoon
ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ
